examples: Wow! There it was, hoofing the lino by the larder door.
After leaving the Baby Lino, we went to the supermarket to buy something.
As usual, we took some pictures for our baby before we sent her to the baby Lino.
We eat neat, narrow triangles of four-month-old clarissa cheese, made by hand by Lino.
Lino is as thin as a whippet, all sinew and lean muscle, and dark with the sun.
